item.title: Join the Salsa Vida newsletter
item.description: Join the Salsa Vida newsletter Get salsa news and updates, new features, festival highlights, and fresh dance resources from Salsa Vida. Website Email address Subscribe By subscribing, you agree to receive emails from Salsa Vida. We process your email as described in our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

item.title: Salsa Vida is your source for salsa dancing online. Our goal is to bring you the best content about salsa dance and other Latin dances, from news and events to music, health, travel, and more.
item.description: Salsa Vida is your source for salsa dancing online. Our goal is to bring you the best content about salsa dance and other Latin dances, from news and events to music, health, travel, and more. Join the Salsa Vida newsletter Get salsa news and updates, new features, festival highlights, and fresh dance resources from Salsa Vida. Website Email address Subscribe By subscribing, you agree to receive emails from Salsa Vida. We process your email as described in our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy. Advertise on Salsa Vida Language: English Español 日本語 Deutsch Français Italiano

item.title: Find upcoming salsa socials, dance parties, and Latin nights happening in New York City.
item.description: Home Events News Articles Videos Salsa Dance Terms Shop + Add Event Home Events News Articles Videos Salsa Dance Terms Shop + Add Event Search the site Search Guides > North America > United States > New York > New York City > Socials Salsa Socials in New York City Find upcoming salsa socials, dance parties, and Latin nights happening in New York City. 66 Upcoming Socials Dance events in the next 30 days + Add Event List View Calendar Map All Events Classes Socials Wed, Jul 1 Thu, Jul 2 Fri, Jul 3 Sat, Jul 4 Sun, Jul 5 Mon, Jul 6 Tue, Jul 7 Wed, Jul 8 Thu, Jul 9 Fri, Jul 10 Sat, Jul 11 Sun, Jul 12 Mon, Jul 13 Tue, Jul 14 Select Date Loading events... 4:00 AM Share Event Monday, July 13, 2026 Class & Social Latin Mondays at 5th & Mad New York City Monday, Jul 13, 2026 5:00 PM - 1:00 AM Share Event Tuesday, July 14, 2026 Social Salsa Tuesdays at Mamajuana Cafe New York City Tuesday, Jul 14, 2026 4:00 PM - 6:00 PM Share Event Load More Events Learn More About Salsa Socials in New York City How many salsa socials are coming up in New York City? New York City has 66 upcoming salsa socials in the next 30 days. Are there salsa parties tonight in New York City? Yes! Check the “Today” tab to see what’s happening tonight. Are there any free salsa socials in New York City? Yes, there are 19 free salsa events in the next 30 days. Any salsa festivals near New York City? See our local festivals page for congresses around New York City, or browse the worldwide festival calendar. Salsa Vida is your source for salsa dancing online. Our goal is to bring you the best content about salsa dance and other Latin dances, from news and events to music, health, travel, and more. Join the Salsa Vida newsletter Get salsa news and updates, new features, festival highlights, and fresh dance resources from Salsa Vida. Website Email address Subscribe By subscribing, you agree to receive emails from Salsa Vida. We process your email as described in our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
